title: Memory leak in sqlite3_create_collation_v2()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_collation (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT COLLATE NOCASE, value INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM test_collation WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_collation);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (data_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, test_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(test_id) REFERENCES test_collation(id));
